title: Redundant Connection
description: Tìm cạnh có thể xóa để graph thành tree (n nodes n edges). Trả edge cuối tạo cycle.
approach: Union-Find: first edge connecting same component is redundant.
memoryTip: Redundant connection — UF detect cycle edge.

solutions.c: int* findRedundantConnection684(int** e,int n,int* rs){ int p[1001],i; for(i=0;i<=n;i++)p[i]=i; int find(int x){ return p[x]==x?x:p[x]=find(p[x]); } for(i=0;i<n;i++){ int u=find(e[i][0]),v=find(e[i][1]); if(u==v){ static int ans[2]; ans[0]=e[i][0]; ans[1]=e[i][1]; *rs=2; return ans;} p[u]=v; } *rs=0; return NULL; }

analysis.correctness: Last edge closing cycle in UF order per problem.
